yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_May_2026_Patch_Tuesday_30_Critical_Vulne {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for May 2026 Patch Tuesday: 30 Critical Vulnerabilities Among 130 CVEs"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-13"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Exploit_for_CVE202529338_exploit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Exploit for CVE-2025-29338 exploit"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-13"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-29338" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Critical_Fortinet_vulnerabilities_fixed_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Critical Fortinet vulnerabilities fixed in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-13"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FortiSandbox" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "FortiAuthenticator" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
